name: @tsuuanmi/pi-workflows
description: Workflow runtime skills for Pi: deep-interview, ralplan, team, and ultragoal

scripts.copy-assets: shx rm -rf dist/agents dist/state/assets dist/skills/deep-interview/assets dist/skills/deep-interview/references dist/skills/deep-interview/scripts dist/skills/ralplan/assets dist/skills/ralplan/references dist/skills/ralplan/scripts dist/skills/team/assets dist/skills/team/references dist/skills/team/scripts dist/skills/ultragoal/assets dist/skills/ultragoal/references dist/skills/ultragoal/scripts && shx mkdir -p dist/skills/deep-interview dist/skills/ralplan dist/skills/team dist/skills/ultragoal dist/state dist/agents && shx cp -r src/state/assets dist/state/ && shx cp src/skills/deep-interview/SKILL.md dist/skills/deep-interview/ && shx cp -r src/skills/deep-interview/assets src/skills/deep-interview/references src/skills/deep-interview/scripts dist/skills/deep-interview/ && shx cp src/skills/ralplan/SKILL.md dist/skills/ralplan/ && shx cp -r src/skills/ralplan/assets src/skills/ralplan/references src/skills/ralplan/scripts dist/skills/ralplan/ && shx cp src/skills/team/SKILL.md dist/skills/team/ && shx cp -r src/skills/team/assets src/skills/team/references src/skills/team/scripts dist/skills/team/ && shx cp src/skills/ultragoal/SKILL.md dist/skills/ultragoal/ && shx cp -r src/skills/ultragoal/assets src/skills/ultragoal/references src/skills/ultragoal/scripts dist/skills/ultragoal/ && shx cp src/agents/*.md dist/agents/
